programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela. Just when it looks like our guys have the upperhand, Cleve shows them he has one last trick up his sleeve – a mech suit!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: While Yi and the crew try to pinpoint how Yi’s magic works, they notice that Everest isn’t looking too hot. In fact, he’s too hot. The crew tries everything to cool him down, even begging their old foe, Burnish, for help. Out of options, Yi tries to use her magic to send Everest home – until Burnish and his jerboa sidekick, Duchess, reveal that they’ve made over the kids’ rooftop fort into a high-tech HQ, complete with various tech gadgets for the crew and a temperature-controlled chamber for Everest.

programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: An earth-shaking rumble signals the arrival of a new creature, but Yi and Jin butt heads, each convinced they’re the better team leader. The crew eventually discovers that the massive Sewer Koi is behind the earthquakes, but he’s missing his precious pearl, the key to a magical underground dam. Without it, the sewer’s water levels will rise, threatening to overflow and flood the whole city! It’s going to take a heist to extract the pearl from its display at a local museum, before it’s too late.

programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: With the sudden closing of a local candy shop, NaiNai is busy trying to recreate its famous candied fruit. The Minticon are sugar-addicted puffball creatures, who previously lived in the old candy shop. programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Birch manages to convince Liam that Sandra's grade-threatening bad mood stems from boy trouble. In an effort to get her out of her funk and into studying again, the cousins invent a secret admirer for Sandra. They soon find Sandra's constant need for affirmation exhausting — a further complication in their attempt to keep up their group grade point average.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: When Sandra signs Pod 4 up for an academic quiz show, the kids are soon figuring out how to best leverage their TV exposure. programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Raffi's win at the district art show hurtles Birch into the five stages of grief, her reactions throwing her podmates for a loop. programme.title: My Life Me

programme.desc: Rediscover the Tet Offensive: two months of battles that killed more than 15,000 American and Allied troops, and triggered anti-war protests across the U.S. Explore reports, images, and combat footage, much of which hasn’t been seen since 1968.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes S2
programme.desc: Experience a chronological recounting of the Apollo 13 near-disaster, one of NASA’s most devastating—and finest—moments. Witness the events of April 1970 as they unfolded through news footage, mission control audio, and NASA archives.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes S2
programme.desc: Examine the 2002 sniper attacks in Washington D.C. through police audio and video, as well as local and national news reports. The sniper’s three-week reign of terror triggered one of the most intense and complicated manhunts in American history.

programme.title: Million Dollar American Princesses S2
programme.desc: Witness the tragic tales of Barbara Hutton, Clara Ward, and Kathleen “Kick” Kennedy, women of beauty, wealth and power who married into European nobility, but ended up shunned by society, family, and the happy endings they hoped to achieve.

programme.title: Million Dollar American Princesses S2
programme.desc: Explore the impact three American women had on British fashion, interior design, and even Parliament. Nancy Astor, Nancy Lancaster, and Pauline de Rothschild made the voyage for different reasons, but each shared the desire to stand up and be heard.

programme.title: Million Dollar American Princesses S2
programme.desc: Meet three actresses who became real-life princesses. Follow Grace Kelly, Gloria Swanson, and Rita Hayworth on their rise from Hollywood royalty to members of European nobility, which brought unparalleled glamour to the aristocracy.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela. Just when it looks like our guys have the upperhand, Cleve shows them he has one last trick up his sleeve – a mech suit!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: While Yi and the crew try to pinpoint how Yi’s magic works, they notice that Everest isn’t looking too hot. In fact, he’s too hot. The crew tries everything to cool him down, even begging their old foe, Burnish, for help. Out of options, Yi tries to use her magic to send Everest home – until Burnish and his jerboa sidekick, Duchess, reveal that they’ve made over the kids’ rooftop fort into a high-tech HQ, complete with various tech gadgets for the crew and a temperature-controlled chamber for Everest.

programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: An earth-shaking rumble signals the arrival of a new creature, but Yi and Jin butt heads, each convinced they’re the better team leader. The crew eventually discovers that the massive Sewer Koi is behind the earthquakes, but he’s missing his precious pearl, the key to a magical underground dam. Without it, the sewer’s water levels will rise, threatening to overflow and flood the whole city! It’s going to take a heist to extract the pearl from its display at a local museum, before it’s too late.

programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: With the sudden closing of a local candy shop, NaiNai is busy trying to recreate its famous candied fruit. But after a late-night sugar binge in NaiNai’s stash, Peng starts acting strangely. It turns out that he’s possessed by magical creatures! The Minticon are sugar-addicted puffball creatures, who previously lived in the old candy shop. Armed with her violin, Yi commands the creatures out of Peng’s body, winning over the Minticon in the process.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Birch manages to convince Liam that Sandra's grade-threatening bad mood stems from boy trouble. In an effort to get her out of her funk and into studying again, the cousins invent a secret admirer for Sandra. They soon find Sandra's constant need for affirmation exhausting — a further complication in their attempt to keep up their group grade point average.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: When Sandra signs Pod 4 up for an academic quiz show, the kids are soon figuring out how to best leverage their TV exposure. It soon becomes obvious that four separate agenda do not add up to a cohesive team as they suffer near humiliation at the hands of the preppie team from Rydell High.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Raffi's win at the district art show hurtles Birch into the five stages of grief, her reactions throwing her podmates for a loop. Luckily, Liam's hip to what's going on thanks to a book Mr. Towes has assigned him. While Sandra trails Liam in hopes of seeing some emotional fireworks on Birch's part, Raffi can't quite get over the idea that Birch wouldn't be happy for his success.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Birch is initially aghast when Jason publishes her Manga “sample” in the school paper, but soon succumbs to the allure of popularity. programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots

programme.desc: Blippi learns fun facts about the world! He discovers how erasers work & why some animals are nocturnal!

programme.title: Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Buster learns to do the right thing! He learns that telling the truth is best & helps save a runaway train!

programme.title: When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Buster becomes a superhero! He leads his friends to safety in a storm & becomes a hero fire truck!

programme.desc: JJ's on an imagination adventure! He sails the seas like a pirate, flies to the moon & finds hidden treasure!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: It's an outdoor adventure! JJ races monster trucks, plays in a water park & sings with a Bananaphone!

programme.title: From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Gecko's on epic adventures, from saving Grandma at a waterfall to launching a spaceship to the moon!

programme.title: Epic Rescues with Grandma Gecko!

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 4

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia - Hunter Valley
programme.desc: Rita and James have just 230 thousand dollars to self-build a sustainable, off-grid family home for themselves and their two kids. They plan to use recycled plastic bags, milk cartons, home-made bricks, and an earthen floor.

programme.title: Common Cause - Ageing Well - Indonesia

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Growing up gay in the hyper-masculine Bayou was tough on Ronald Dominique. An inability to connect and a prison sexual assault would cement his decision to ultimately kill his first victim.

programme.desc: Singer Island, Florida, is heaven on earth, but it quickly becomes a living hell when a beloved local couple goes missing. Family, friends and the FBI all step in to help.

programme.desc: In a revealing conversation, Tanya recounts the horror of the 10 years she spent in captivity in her predator's bedroom, and confides in Elizabeth about the realities of grooming.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: In Mobile, a father of four is found dead inside a car after a mysterious crash, and detectives discover that his death was no accident.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A father attacks his son's killer in court; a defendant drops the f-bomb during a virtual hearing; a man convicted of child abuse lashes out at the judge; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: An alleged child sex offender and arsonist jumps to his death over a courthouse railing; a man accused of attempted murder headbutts his own lawyer; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: A woman in a volatile relationship is found dead in her car. Detectives suspect her boyfriend, but, at trial, he takes the stand to brazenly claim she was actually the victim of a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Nia Wilson and her two sisters decided to take public transportation back home. But just minutes after texting their father, the sisters were brutally targeted at a train station.

programme.desc: Tales of toxic love triangles—wives who stray from their husbands with disastrous results, a deadly case of online catfishing, and a lonely young woman who has an affair with a killer.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphaël, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Chniwla Et Boubris
programme.desc: Boubris is an introverted lizard who dreams of peace and quiet. A former musician, he fled the hustle and settled away from the world. Until the day Chniwla, a hyperactive and intrusive mosquito, disrupts his daily life.

programme.title: L'Aventure Du Monde Des Mondes
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anaïs's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: A Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. The programme addresses economic, social, environmental and health issues and talks about leisure activities, technology...

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Vivement Dimanche
programme.desc: On his iconic red sofa, Michel Drucker welcomes and shines the spotlight on the talent of yesterday, today and tomorrow. A main guest talks about their career, their projects and their origins...

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: Peuples Des Sommets
programme.desc: Guillaume sets off to meet the inhabitants of Mala Crna Gora, a tiny village perched in the Durmitor mountains in the heart of Montenegro. Isolated from the rest of the world, the villagers there perpetuate an ancestral way of life, punctuated by the seasons, manual labour, and the bond with the land.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion

programme.title: SAF
programme.desc: Desperate, Kamil takes a low wage job in Istanbul's urbanization project. In so doing, he displaces a Syrian refugee and partakes in his neighborhood’s destruction, while also needing to pay for the required permits. One day, Kamil suddenly disappears.

programme.title: Diana's Wedding
programme.desc: Through the eyes of Diana, we witness the rollercoaster ride of both her parent’s and Irene’s marriages. To both girls, they have the worst parents in the world. But at the end of the day, which of the couples remain strong and which fall apart ?

programme.title: Wajma, An Afghan Love Story
programme.desc: In conservative Kabul, young Wajma discovers she is pregnant out of wedlock. Her boyfriend denies paternity and her father locks her up for being a disgrace. Driven by desperation, Wajma takes extreme measures forcing everyone to re-think their actions.

programme.title: Bad Investigate
programme.desc: A corrupt cop sets out to hunt down a dangerous drug dealer who is seeking revenge for the death of his brother. Also trying to catch the same criminal is an FBI agent.

programme.title: Black As The Snow
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the rampage in the ski resort of Morzine-Avoriaz. Vivier, French police officer teams up with the Swiss policeman Meyer to investigate the suspicious deaths of teenagers. They must find the killer before the victim list grows.

programme.title: Top Dogs
programme.desc: A dramedy about two estranged brothers from Normandy. Antoine is happily married with two kids and a successful boat driver, whereas Christian is a globe-trotting hustler. When Antoine becomes involved in sleazy activities, Christian comes to his rescue.

programme.title: 180 Degree Rule
programme.desc: Sara, a schoolteacher from Tehran, is preparing to attend a wedding in northern Iran with her family. When her husband suddenly forbids her from going, she hatches a plan to go in secret. But her choice soon places her on a painful path to atonement.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

programme.title: Romancing The Jungle
programme.desc: Eva is a rookie journalist keen on investigating sea piracy. When she is really kidnapped by pirates in Thailand, she is forced to fight for her life. With her is a hunky smuggler called Nik, and together, the comedic duo band together to survive.

programme.title: Running On Sand
programme.desc: When an Eritrean refugee about to be deported from Israel is mistaken for the Nigerian striker just signed to a struggling soccer team, his fate depends on the team’s success in this charming, socially relevant dramedy.

programme.title: SAF
programme.desc: Desperate, Kamil takes a low wage job in Istanbul's urbanization project. In so doing, he displaces a Syrian refugee and partakes in his neighborhood’s destruction, while also needing to pay for the required permits. One day, Kamil suddenly disappears.

programme.title: Ghost Mountaineer
programme.desc: In the former Soviet Union, a group of Estonian students go hiking in Siberia. After their unpopular leader Olle vanishes, his rival Eero leads the group to seek help, and a series of bizarre and terrifying events unfold.

programme.title: Oddball
programme.desc: An eccentric chicken farmer, with the help of his granddaughter, trains his mischievous dog Oddball to protect a penguin sanctuary from fox attacks in an attempt to reunite his family and save their seaside town.

programme.title: Kaaga Re
programme.desc: After the mysterious death of one his regular passengers, Kulleh a boatman is driven to insanity as he tries to find her body and bury it.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: Complicity
programme.desc: Inspired by a real-life incident. Cheng Liang, a Chinese illegal immigrant in Japan finds new direction when he fakes his identity and lands an apprenticeship with a master soba chef. However, the threat of deportation always lurks around the corner.

programme.title: Double Yummy - EP 3
programme.desc: BEEFY BATTLE: SG Hainanese Noodles vs Taiwan Beef Soup! Two bowls, one soulful ingredient. Singapore’s Hainanese-style Beef Noodles comes thick, hearty and slurp-worthy, while Taiwan’s celebrated Beef Soup keeps things delicate and clean, spotlighting the natural sweetness of the meat. It’s comfort food from two culinary historiesboth equally heartwarming.

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: While life in the idyllic town of Marlow has just about returned to normal after a chain of murders rattled the tightly knit community, it’s not long before retired archaeologist Judith Potts, dog-walker Suzie Harris, and Vicar’s wife Becks Starling are called back into action to solve a series of new crimes that befall the local residents.

programme.title: Transplant S4 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bash and Mags support each other as doctors through new challenges, treating an older couple who arrives hospital glued together. Liz Bergeron confronts Theo about his inability to follow hospital rules. June makes a surprise announcement.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 24
programme.desc: Aunty Lee turns matchmaker when an old friend begs for help marrying off her son before he turns thirty lest disaster strike, according to superstition.

programme.title: Three Wishes - EP 18 三个愿望
programme.desc: Yaojin is an unlucky 45 year-old father facing many challenges both at home and at work. One day, he met a mysterious old lady and was given 3 gold coins for 3 wishes...

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 3 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Wei Ren's ex-wife, Zi Wei, tells him that En Bloc is currently a very hot market. Wei Ren is interested and prepares materials to persuade his boss, Max, to enter the market and increase the company's profit. Wei Ren proposes to Yan Xun to let Mei Hao Yuan go for the En Bloc project. Yan Xun feels that he needs more time to consider.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 4 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Shu Juan is shock when she did not see the sofa at the corridor. Yan Xun admits that he instructs the workers to shift the sofa away. Shu Juan and Yan Xun have an argument. Yan Xun falls and hits his tailbone, causing his old problems to arise again. Xi Yue accompanies him to the doctor. Xiao Long and Shu Juan sneer at the couple when they see them on the way home. The couple ignores them.

programme.title: Bountiful Blessings - EP 1 万福楼
programme.desc: Fuxi and her father Er-Hu run a restaurant called Wan Fu Lou. Her husband left her and her daughter Yi Fei years ago. Dafeng, who was suppose to marry Fuxi, left after her act of betrayal. It turns out Fuxi's husband is the Kitchen God and his fate is intertwined with hers. Years ago, he came down from the heavens to try and help match-make Dafeng and Fuxi but in a mistake, ends up getting Fuxi pregnant.

programme.title: Bountiful Blessings - EP 2 万福楼
programme.desc: Fuxi faces a restaurant problem with a food poisoning issue and has no choice but to look for Dafeng for help. Dafeng wants her to sell Wan Fu Lou to him, and says he is the cause of her problem. It turns out Dafeng wants revenge after being humiliated and heart-broken when Fuxi had to cancel their wedding plans. To make up to Dafeng, Fuxi decides to sell Wan Fu Lou.

programme.desc: A dramedy about two estranged brothers from Normandy. Antoine is happily married with two kids and a successful boat driver, whereas Christian is a globe-trotting hustler. When Antoine becomes involved in sleazy activities, Christian comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

programme.title: Running On Sand
programme.desc: When an Eritrean refugee about to be deported from Israel is mistaken for the Nigerian striker just signed to a struggling soccer team, his fate depends on the team’s success in this charming, socially relevant dramedy.

programme.title: Ghost Mountaineer
programme.desc: In the former Soviet Union, a group of Estonian students go hiking in Siberia. After their unpopular leader Olle vanishes, his rival Eero leads the group to seek help, and a series of bizarre and terrifying events unfold.

programme.title: Until Tomorrow
programme.desc: A single mother's courage is tested when she resorts to desperate measures to hide her illegitimate child from her parents.

programme.title: Oddball
programme.desc: An eccentric chicken farmer, with the help of his granddaughter, trains his mischievous dog Oddball to protect a penguin sanctuary from fox attacks in an attempt to reunite his family and save their seaside town.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Dutch tycoon Jan dies suddenly in Indonesia, leaving his wife Agathe in shock. Their son and his pregnant wife come from the Netherlands to inherit the family empire and are dismayed to find out that Jan's mistress Siti has a crucial role in his will.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: To My Beloved
programme.desc: Fernando is a good man who takes care of his only child, Daniel. Following the death of his wife Ana, every night Fernando recalls their love as he sorts out his beloved dead spouse’s belongings. One day he finds a VHS tape that will change everything.

programme.title: Complicity
programme.desc: Inspired by a real-life incident. Cheng Liang, a Chinese illegal immigrant in Japan finds new direction when he fakes his identity and lands an apprenticeship with a master soba chef. However, the threat of deportation always lurks around the corner.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows The Detective And The Fear
programme.desc: When Inspector Martin Brühl awakens in the morning, he is alarmed by partner Susanne Koch’s absence. Unbeknownst to him, Susanne witnessed a crime on her nightly walk home. Critically injured in an ATM explosion, she was kidnapped by the perpetrators.

programme.title: Europa
programme.desc: Kamal has fled Iraq to try to enter "Fortress Europe". At the Turkish-Bulgarian border, local mercenaries are ruthlessly hunting down migrants. Alone in the forest, Kamal has three days to escape.

programme.title: Black Snow
programme.desc: Gosha is a trucker in northern Yakutia, who supplies his community with food, alongside low quality vodka which contributes to their alcoholism. When his truck breaks down during one of his trips, he finds himself alone in the wilderness.

programme.title: I Have Electric Dreams
programme.desc: 16-year-old Eva is experiencing her sexual awakening and is desperate to leave the house she shares with her mother and younger sister and move in with her estranged father, a troubled artist who paints, sculpts, writes poetry and drinks too much.
